creator: mozilla@tuxproject.de
text:
Created attachment 186355
portmaster build log

While trying to update the lang/sbcl port from version 1.3.20_2,1 to 1.3.21,1 on FreeBSD 11.1, this happens:

> 2 out of 25 total tests failed: SB-CONCURRENCY-TEST::FRLOCK.1, 
>   SB-CONCURRENCY-TEST::MAILBOX.MULTIPLE-PRODUCERS-MULTIPLE-CONSUMERS.

Also, sb-sprof fails.

I have not changed any build options since the latest successful build, so the port might be broken.

Full portmaster log attached.
